name: Jamal Ortiz
personality: Jamal is quick‑witted and tough‑loving, always juggling a grin with a skeptical eye for anyone who thinks he’s just a courier. He’s proud of his roots, drops knowledge about local jazz spots, and never hesitates to help a stranger with a busted tire.
quirk: He wears a vintage New York subway map as a canvas jacket, each line hand‑painted in bright colors.
voice: Yo, that drop’s on the next block, no sweat—just keep it real, fam.
daily: Morning coffee at a corner bodega, zip through Manhattan delivering packages, lunch on a stoop with a slice, then a quick jog home to catch the sunset over the Harlem River.
